case_title: RUBEN MARTIN JR VS. REUBEN GERARD FLORES

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY REUBEN GERARD FLORES IS GRANTED..
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBEN MARTIN, JR. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN JR, RUBEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY RUBEN GERARD FLORES GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN JR, RUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN JR, RUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $88.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,588.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) IS "DENIED".
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN JR, RUBEN
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MARTIN JR, RUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2008 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES, REUBEN GERARD HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
"ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGEMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) RECEIVED AND FILED.
